title: i thought you should know by The Snowflowers
lyrics: I used to be able to see all that was ahead of me. I used to look at you like maybe you knew. You told me, baby, you had the answers to it all. You told me that you, you knew, you knew. And I thought that I saw, but all I seen was imaginary. My imagination, it's taking me to places I reach. Sometimes I close my eyes, and I hope it's not true. I look at you like you knew. I look at you like you should have protected me. But I should have protected you. My heart's here for you always, always. And I thought I did it. I don't know what to do to get back to where you thought I was. They put me up on that fucking pedestal. Why are you so cold? I thought you knew. I needed you to know. I believed in you. Now I call you on the phone. I don't know what I'm doing. I'm just so angry. Sometimes I look at you minute by minute, call by call. I don't know for the first time. Maybe the second time. I don't really fucking know. All I really fucking know is that I love you. I miss you. I miss you. And I wish I could scratch you out of my mind. But you're there, you're there, you're there. Every time I close my eyes, you're there, you're there, you're there. And I wipe the tears from my eyes. I think about you all the time. I need you to be part of my life. The one that doesn't bring me down, the one that flips me up, I swear we can do it. You're my inspiration.

lyricsSegments.text: I used to be able to see all that was ahead of me.
I used to look at you like maybe you knew.
You told me, baby, you had the answers to it all.
You told me that you, you knew, you knew.
And I thought that I saw, but all I seen was imaginary.
My imagination, it's taking me to places I reach.
Sometimes I close my eyes, and I hope it's not true.
I look at you like you knew.
I look at you like you should have protected me.
But I should have protected you.
My heart's here for you always, always.
And I thought I did it.
I don't know what to do to get back to where you thought I was.
They put me up on that fucking pedestal.
Why are you so cold?
I thought you knew.
I needed you to know.
I believed in you.
Now I call you on the phone.
I don't know what I'm doing.
I'm just so angry.
Sometimes I look at you minute by minute, call by call.
I don't know for the first time.
Maybe the second time.
I don't really fucking know.
All I really fucking know
is that I love you.
I miss you.
I miss you.
And I wish I could scratch you out of my mind.
But you're there, you're there, you're there.
Every time I close my eyes, you're there, you're there, you're there.
And I wipe the tears from my eyes.
I think about you all the time.
I need you to be part of my life.
The one that doesn't bring me down, the one that flips me up, I swear we can do it.
You're my inspiration.
